generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on permanent magnet synchronous motor for measuring motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind cycloidal gearbox for measuring joint angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngleDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors for measuring motor current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance AngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current I_M input and torque τ_M output"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint angle data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models and dynamics simulations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, AngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, CustomDashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for first axis structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for first axis structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling and asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousJointFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation and dynamics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousJointFrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousJointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousJointFrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance CustomDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard for sensor and simulation data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousJointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of sensor and simulation data"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics enabling control parameter updates for improved motion accuracy, derived from deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update control parameters based on friction model refinement to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with continuous updates during robot operation for friction model identification and motion control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated system comprising SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, MQTT data streaming, and a unified dashboard for visualizing measured and simulated data traces to support friction model identification."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, continuously updated during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying operational conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data for friction models, with white-box and black-box models evaluated against real-time operational data to identify deviations and improve motion accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Industrie 4.0 standards via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for system modeling and data exchange."
]
